title: Dianoia – AI Crime Scene Investigation
description: AI-powered crime scene investigation tool using spatial intelligence to reconstruct and analyze 3D crime scenes, enabling investigators to explore evidence spatially.

title: SherlockOS – Spatio-temporal Deduction
description: A spatio-temporal deduction engine powered by Gemini that reasons across space and time to solve complex investigative scenarios.

title: Rewind – Memory Revisiting in 3D
description: An immersive 3D experience that lets users revisit and explore memories through spatial AI, reconstructing past moments in navigable 3D environments.

title: VideoStack – AI Video Platform
description: AI-powered video creation platform leveraging ElevenLabs for voice synthesis and content generation, enabling rapid professional video production.

title: Eyed Search – Deep Research Platform
description: A deep research platform built with Anthropic Claude that performs multi-step web research, synthesizing information from multiple sources into comprehensive answers.

title: Wiggly – AI 3D T-shirt Design
description: AI-powered 3D t-shirt design platform where users generate custom designs with AI and preview them on interactive 3D models rendered with Three.js.

title: Le Scribe Royal – Versailles Guide
description: An AI-powered guide for the Palace of Versailles using RAG and voice UI, providing accessible historical narratives through real-time conversational interactions.

title: LyricMind – Fine-tuned Lyric Generation
description: A fine-tuned language model for generating song lyrics, trained with QLoRA on Qwen2.5-7B and refined using RLAIF-DPO alignment to produce emotionally resonant lyrics.

title: GitBeat – Repo to Music
description: Transforms GitHub repositories into unique musical compositions using AI, analyzing code patterns and commit history to generate songs with Suno AI.

title: Musixtral – AI Music Production
description: AI music production assistant powered by Mistral AI and MCP protocol, bridging AI capabilities with digital audio workstations for intelligent music creation workflows.

title: BuzzLab – AI Brand Creation
description: Multi-agent AI platform for automated brand creation, generating brand identities, marketing content, and promotional videos using CAMEL-AI orchestration.

title: EmoHunter – Emotion Detection
description: Emotion detection system combining iOS and Apple Watch biometric data with AI voice analysis and multi-agent reasoning for real-time mental health monitoring.

title: ServeTheVibe – Humming to Music
description: A creative coding performance tool that transforms humming and vocal input into live-coded music using Strudel, bridging human expression with algorithmic composition.

title: OnTrack – Multi-Agent Study Planner
description: Multi-agent AI study planner that uses LangChain and OpenSearch to create personalized learning paths, coordinating multiple AI agents to optimize study schedules.

title: HealthOdyssey – OneHealth Dashboard
description: Comprehensive health dashboard integrating AI and AutoML for OneHealth data visualization and analysis, providing actionable insights across health metrics.

title: ZenQ – Quantum ML Framework
description: Quantum machine learning framework implementing Quantum Convolutional Neural Networks with Perceval photonic simulator, bridging quantum computing and deep learning.

title: Movie Recommendation System
description: Ensemble-based movie recommendation system combining collaborative and content-based filtering using PyTorch, TensorFlow, and Surprise library.

title: MealMate – AI Recipe Recommendations
description: AI-powered recipe recommendation system using YOLOv5 for ingredient detection and Meta Llama with RAG for personalized recipe suggestions from available ingredients.

title: Flappy Bird – Reinforcement Learning
description: Reinforcement learning agent trained to play Flappy Bird using NEAT evolutionary algorithm, demonstrating neuroevolution for game AI.
